scripts.test:collections: for f in collections/*.json; do echo "Running $f" && newman run "$f" -e "${POSTMAN_ENV:-environment/docker.json}" --ignore-redirects --insecure --bail || { echo "Failed: $f"; exit 1; }; done
scripts.test:collections:parallel: mkdir -p logs && printf '%s\n' collections/*.json | POSTMAN_ENV="${POSTMAN_ENV:-environment/docker.json}" xargs -P "${POSTMAN_CONCURRENCY:-2}" -I {} sh -c 'echo "START $1" && newman run "$1" -e "$POSTMAN_ENV" --ignore-redirects --insecure --bail > "logs/$(basename "$1").log" 2>&1 && echo "PASS $1" || { echo "FAIL $1"; tail -40 "logs/$(basename "$1").log"; exit 1; }' _ {}
